rules.title: Most Important Rule: READ
body: Always read the announcements, instructions, and pinned posts to know how to use the channels properly.
See the server guide for a quick overview of available server features.

rules.title: Personal Information
body: Do not publish or share personal information without one's consent, in and out of Discord. This includes posting screenshots and videos on other social media sites.

rules.title: Display Photo and Name
body: No offensive and vulgar nicknames are allowed. Display photos should not contain any offensive or illegal content.

rules.title: Respect Everyone
body: Trolling is prohibited in the server. Do not be disruptive or make other study buddies feel uncomfortable. Do not deliberately incite drama. Respect other people's opinions.

rules.title: Incitement
body: Do not encourage others to break rules or incite others to be blatantly rude and offensive.
Promoting or encouraging conflicts between other members is an offense in the server and may result in punitive measures for both the rule-breaker and the person encouraging the behavior.

rules.title: Violation of Discord Community Guidelines
body: Discord itself has specific behavioral and content guidelines. Not following those guidelines may result in an instant ban.
highlights: You must be at least 13 years of age to use Discord.
Sharing sexually explicit content of minors, whether real or animated, is prohibited.
Glorifying self-harm or suicide is not allowed.
Sharing pirated or illegally acquired software or stolen accounts is prohibited.

rules.title: Offensive and Hate Speech
body: Sending hate speech including racial slurs or derivatives, sexist or homophobic statements, and alike is strictly prohibited.
Refrain from posting offensive content and harsh comments in topics such as politics, religion, and other serious topics.

rules.title: Bullying and Harassment
body: Do not insult others or send aggressive messages to other users.

rules.title: Respect the Moderators
body: Do not insult your server moderators or attack them through private messages.

rules.title: Unnecessary Pings
body: No unnecessary pings such as mass pings, ghost pings, and random pings. Frequent pings that are considered harassment or spam are not allowed.
Mentioning @everyone, @here, or 10 or more users in a short span is not allowed and may result in a warning.

rules.title: Voice Channel Etiquette
body: No vaping, smoking, or sleeping in public study rooms. Wear appropriate clothes when on camera. Tank tops are fine, but being topless is not allowed. Avoid making unnecessary noise when your microphone is turned on.

When on cam, do not display distracting photos or videos. For SORs, virtual backgrounds, camera covers, or OBS overlays are not allowed as they defeat the purpose. Members may be disconnected, kicked, or banned without prior notice if these rules are willfully violated.

rules.title: Live Streaming
body: Streaming games while inside the study rooms is strictly prohibited. No streaming of inappropriate content is allowed in any voice channel.

rules.title: No Posting of NSFW Content
body: Sending sexually explicit content and posting discussions of nudity, sexuality, violence, and the like are strictly prohibited.

rules.title: No Advertising Unless Approved by the Council
body: Posting or advertising servers, giveaways, unofficial tournaments, your own social media or content channels, or offering paid academic or assignment help services is not allowed unless approved by a moderator.
Dropshipping and similar promotions are strictly prohibited. Posting Discord invite links without approval may result in a warning or stricter actions.
Please check out the plugs channel and read the guidelines there.

rules.title: No Sending of Harmful Material
body: Sending harmful materials such as GIF bugs, viruses, IP grabbers, or malware that cause malfunction on the server or on any member's hardware is prohibited.

rules.title: No Spamming
body: No spamming is allowed in this server or in direct messages to server members. This includes image spam, text spam, link spam, emoji spam, and tag spam.
highlights: Sending the same 8 or more messages in 5 seconds.
Sending messages in 4 or more channels in 5 seconds.
Uploading 12 or more attachments in 3 seconds.

rules.title: No Academic Cheating
body: Explicitly asking for answers for any module, quiz, exam questions, and alike is prohibited. Asking help for opinions, validation, and how to solve is allowed.

sections.name: DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS
sections.intro: If a study buddy fails to follow any of these rules, disciplinary action shall be given.

rules.title: General escalation path
highlights: Fourth offense: the DETENTION role will be assigned
Fifth offense and more: kick or permanent ban from the server

rules.title: Additional notes
highlights: If a user's account appears to be compromised or hacked, they may be kicked from the server or assigned the DETENTION role as a precautionary measure.
If a user is placed under the detention role and does not submit an appeal within 30 days, they may be removed from the server. All decisions are made on a case-by-case basis.

Severe violations may be dealt with as needed. Moderators will evaluate all posts based on the Community Standards, Content Guidelines, Terms of Service, and Unique Channel Guidelines, and punishment will be at their discretion.
